gloss: stands in a cause-and-effect relation to some outcome
a state of affairs that follows necessarily from another
follows as a logical or causal consequence
to act as the primary cause sustaining some process
a state of affairs produced by an antecedent cause
to make some outcome possible by removing constraints
a substantive effect upon some target system
to bring about an outcome through causal action
a partial causal contribution shaping some outcome
the end state produced by some process
to keep some outcome from coming about
an outcome that follows from some process
arises as a result of some prior cause
to initiate or set in motion a subsequent event
to produce some result as a causal output
